FFlagUnifiedPurchaseModalUiImprovements_.mechanism: Updates the user interface for purchase modals to be more consistent and user-friendly.
FFlagUnifiedPurchaseModalUiImprovements_.purpose: Makes it easier for players to understand and complete purchases.

FFlagAXEnableUnifiedPurchaseFlowForLooks.mechanism: Integrates the purchase process for avatar looks into a single streamlined flow.
FFlagAXEnableUnifiedPurchaseFlowForLooks.purpose: Simplifies the way players buy and equip new looks for their avatars.

FStringAXMISExperimentLayerName_Staged.mechanism: Sets a specific name for a layer in the experiment related to avatar customization.
FStringAXMISExperimentLayerName_Staged.purpose: Helps developers track and manage changes in avatar customization features.

DFFlagSimRemoveDuplicateUpdateJointCall_.mechanism: Eliminates redundant calls to update joints in the simulation engine.
DFFlagSimRemoveDuplicateUpdateJointCall_.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing unnecessary processing.

DFLogBootcampCLI173012Log.mechanism: Logs specific actions or events related to the bootcamp command line interface.
DFLogBootcampCLI173012Log.purpose: Aids in debugging and improving the bootcamp experience for new developers.

FFlagAppChatEnableFormFactor.mechanism: Enables chat features based on the device type being used.
FFlagAppChatEnableFormFactor.purpose: Improves chat functionality for players depending on whether they are on mobile, desktop, or console.

FFlagFoundationMenuItemStyles_Staged.mechanism: Updates the visual styles of menu items in a staged environment.
FFlagFoundationMenuItemStyles_Staged.purpose: Enhances the appearance and usability of menus for a better player experience.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed and displayed in strings.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Makes the display of time-related information faster and more efficient for players.

FFlagSelfieConsentAuditLog.mechanism: Tracks and logs consent for taking selfies within the game.
FFlagSelfieConsentAuditLog.purpose: Ensures player privacy and compliance by recording when players agree to share their selfies.

FFlagFoundationLazyOverlayLoading.mechanism: Delays the loading of overlay elements until they are needed.
FFlagFoundationLazyOverlayLoading.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing initial load times for players.

FFlagLuauUnreducedTypeFunctionsDontTrigg.mechanism: Prevents warnings for certain function types in Luau scripting.
FFlagLuauUnreducedTypeFunctionsDontTrigg.purpose: Allows developers to write cleaner code without unnecessary warnings.

FFlagResolvePropertySourceConflictWithPs.mechanism: Fixes conflicts between property sources and pseudo properties.
FFlagResolvePropertySourceConflictWithPs.purpose: Ensures smoother interactions and fewer errors when using properties in scripts.

FFlagFoundationPopoverContentStateFix_St.mechanism: Corrects the state management of popover content in the UI framework.
FFlagFoundationPopoverContentStateFix_St.purpose: Improves the reliability and user experience of popovers in the game interface.

FFlagExpChatConnectInitCommands.mechanism: Enables initial command connections in the chat system.
FFlagExpChatConnectInitCommands.purpose: Enhances chat functionality, allowing players to use commands more effectively.

DFFlagRbxStorageReportSysMem_Staged.mechanism: Tracks system memory usage for Roblox storage.
DFFlagRbxStorageReportSysMem_Staged.purpose: Helps optimize performance by monitoring memory usage during gameplay.

FStringRecommendationUniverseAllowList_P.mechanism: Filters places based on a predefined list for recommendations.
FStringRecommendationUniverseAllowList_P.purpose: Helps players discover relevant games that match their interests.

FFlagAcousticSimulationApproximateTerrai.mechanism: Improves sound calculations by approximating terrain interactions.
FFlagAcousticSimulationApproximateTerrai.purpose: Enhances audio realism in games, making sounds more immersive.

FFlagPTFKeyboardReceiveKeyEvents.mechanism: Allows the game to capture keyboard input events more effectively.
FFlagPTFKeyboardReceiveKeyEvents.purpose: Improves responsiveness and control for players using keyboard inputs.
